title: Sour and Juicy Savory Cherry Broil Greek Cherries Stir-Fry
description: This savory cherry broil Greek dish is perfect for a date night, featuring juicy cherries in a plant-based-friendly recipe that adds a delightful touch to any meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup cherry tomatoes (canned or fresh), halved

instructions: Preheat your broiler according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Wash and drain cherries, if using frozen. In a bowl, mix cherries with olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Arrange cherry mixture on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil. Place under the preheated broiler for 8-10 minutes until the cherries are lightly charred and tender.
Stir in sliced mushrooms and halved cherry tomatoes if using. Continue to stir-fry for an additional 3-5 minutes, until all ingredients are heated through and cherry mixture is evenly mixed.
Serve hot as a side dish or on its own as a main course with crusty bread.
